title: Defunding Power Cost Equalization Would Gut a Lifeline for Rural Alaska
summary: By Meera Kohler, President/CEO of AVEC A year and a half ago, the Power Cost Equalization (PCE) endowment was on the verge of disappearing into the Constitutional Budget Reserve, when the Legislature reversed the sweep and the endowment remained intact. During election season, we heard from some legislative candidates who believe the PCE endowment is just a pot of money that can be used to fill the budget gap. This would be a one-time infusion that would gut a lifeline program for rural Alaska. Understanding PCE is a challenge for folks who are unfamiliar with rural Alaska, so a brief history of the program might help. Rural Alask...

title: ARA and ANVCA Congratulate Biden, Sullivan, Young
